title: Dialogflow
description: Connects the caller to a Google Dialogflow agent for a voice conversation. Supports Dialogflow ES, CX, and CES models. The caller speaks and Dialogflow handles intent detection and response generation.

id.description: An optional unique identifier for this verb instance.

credentials.description: Google service account credentials as a JSON object or stringified JSON.

agent.description: The Dialogflow agent ID. Required for CX agents.

region.description: The Google Cloud region for the Dialogflow API endpoint.

model.description: The Dialogflow model type: 'es' for Dialogflow ES, 'cx' for Dialogflow CX, 'ces' for Dialogflow CES.

lang.description: The language code for the conversation (e.g. 'en-US').

actionHook.description: A webhook invoked when the Dialogflow session ends.

eventHook.description: A webhook invoked for Dialogflow events during the conversation.

events.description: List of event types to receive via the eventHook.

welcomeEvent.description: A Dialogflow event to trigger at the start of the conversation (e.g. 'welcome').

welcomeEventParams.description: Parameters to pass with the welcome event.

noInputTimeout.description: Seconds to wait for caller input before triggering the no-input event.

noInputEvent.description: Dialogflow event to trigger when no input is received within the timeout.

passDtmfAsTextInput.description: If true, pass DTMF digits to Dialogflow as text input.

thinkingMusic.description: URL of an audio file to play while waiting for Dialogflow to respond.

bargein.description: If true, allow the caller to interrupt Dialogflow responses with speech.

queryInput.description: Initial query input to send to Dialogflow.
